note: A single-sensor residual (redundant 9>6 measurement, Ch.27) detects only the part of distortion INCONSISTENT with the dipole model; distortion that mimics a 6-DOF pose shift inflates error but not the residual. The detection margin (eta_danger - eta_flag) is therefore GEOMETRY-DEPENDENT and can be NEGATIVE (flag fires AFTER the error is dangerous). Conclusion: a single residual flag is necessary but NOT sufficient -> independent redundancy (witness sensor Ch.27.3, 2nd generator Ch.9.8, fusion Ch.21.9) is required, and flag latency/false-alarm MUST be measured per the proposed Ch.33 §33.9 benchmark, not assumed.
